auction_sources.name: AUCTION_COM
auction_sources.llm_prompt: This is an Auction.com residential foreclosure/auction listing page. Extract EVERY property listed. For each property return an object with: address, city, state, zip, opening_bid (the starting/current bid as a number), estimated_value, auction_date, beds, baths, sqft, property_type, url. Return a JSON array. If a field is missing use null. Skip ads and navigation.

auction_sources.name: XOME_AUCTIONS
auction_sources.llm_prompt: This is a Xome real-estate auction page. Extract every auction property. For each return: address, city, state, zip, opening_bid, estimated_value, auction_date, beds, baths, sqft, property_type, url. JSON array only. Missing fields = null.

auction_sources.name: HUBZU
auction_sources.llm_prompt: This is a Hubzu listing/auction page. Extract every property. For each return: address, city, state, zip, opening_bid, estimated_value, auction_date, beds, baths, sqft, property_type, url. JSON array only. Missing fields = null.

auction_sources.name: BID4ASSETS
auction_sources.llm_prompt: This is a Bid4Assets county tax/foreclosure auction search page. Extract every real-estate auction listing. For each return: title, address, city, state, zip, opening_bid, auction_date, parcel_id, url. JSON array only. Missing fields = null.

auction_sources.name: GOVEASE_TAX_SALE
auction_sources.llm_prompt: This is a GovEase tax-sale auction directory. Extract every auction or property for state {state}. For each return: address, city, state, opening_bid, auction_date, parcel_id, property_type, url. JSON array only. Missing fields = null.

auction_sources.name: HUD_HOMES
auction_sources.llm_prompt: This is a HUD Home Store search-results page of HUD-owned homes for sale. Extract every property. For each return: address, city, state, zip, list_price, beds, baths, sqft, year_built, property_type, url, case_number. JSON array only. Missing fields = null.

auction_sources.name: REALTOR_FORECLOSURE
auction_sources.llm_prompt: This is a Realtor.com foreclosure search page. Extract every foreclosure/pre-foreclosure property. For each return: address, city, state, zip, list_price, beds, baths, sqft, year_built, property_type, foreclosure_status, url. JSON array only. Missing fields = null.

auction_sources.name: ZILLOW_PREFORECLOSURE
auction_sources.llm_prompt: This is a Zillow foreclosure/pre-foreclosure search page. Extract every property card. For each return: address, city, state, zip, price (or opening_bid), zestimate (estimated_value), beds, baths, sqft, foreclosure_status, url. JSON array only. Missing fields = null.

playwright_settings.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

free_lead_sources.notes: All free. Craigslist and Reddit use public APIs/RSS. Zillow uses Playwright.
